rows.finalText: One workable lens for "What is the next right step in my calling" is Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Child (13) in Past sets the tone with fresh perspective can reset stale assumptions. Here, Child emphasizes fresh perspective can reset stale assumptions, with beginning, small, and fresh close to the surface. Present turns on Garden (20), bringing public context and community shape momentum to the hinge of the reading and asking for one careful adjustment.
